# People

Topics in the **People** category of *the year 2012*.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: category-index — maintained by build-structure; do not edit by hand -->
| Topic | Summary |
|-------|---------|
| [Vladimir Putin — 2012 Return to Presidency](vladimir-putin-2012-presidency.md) | Inaugurated for a third presidential term on May 7 after a term-limit swap with Dmitry Medvedev; his return amid the Bolotnaya Square protests ushered in tightened domestic controls and Russia's Syria-related UN Security Council vetoes. |
| [Barack Obama — 2012 Re-election Victory](barack-obama-2012-reelection.md) | Re-elected on November 6 with 332 electoral votes over Mitt Romney; the win consolidated a new Democratic demographic coalition and effectively ratified the Affordable Care Act. |
| [Juan Manuel Santos — Colombian Peace Process](juan-manuel-santos-peace-process.md) | Opened formal peace negotiations with the FARC in Havana on November 19, launching the process that ended Latin America's longest armed conflict and earned the 2016 Nobel Peace Prize. |
| [Malala Yousafzai October 2012 Shooting](malala-yousafzai-2012-shooting.md) | The October 9 Taliban shooting of the 15-year-old Pakistani education activist aboard her school bus in Swat Valley; her survival and recovery in Birmingham catalyzed a global girls'-education movement and led to her 2014 Nobel Peace Prize. |
| [Peter Jackson — Filmmaker and The Hobbit Trilogy Creator](peter-jackson-filmmaker.md) | The New Zealand director who, after the record-breaking *Lord of the Rings* trilogy, released *The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey* on December 14, 2012 — a $1.017 billion grosser whose 48fps high-frame-rate presentation was the year's most debated technical experiment, anchored by the Wētā studios he helped build. |
| [Marissa Mayer Becomes Yahoo CEO](marissa-mayer-yahoo-ceo-2012.md) | The Google veteran's July 16 appointment as Yahoo's president and CEO — the first female chief executive hired from outside the company and its fifth CEO in five years — drew wide attention for women's representation in technology leadership and for her bid to revive the struggling internet pioneer through product focus and acquisitions. |
| [Mohamed Morsi — 2012 Egyptian Presidency and Muslim Brotherhood](mohamed-morsi-2012-presidency.md) | Egypt's first civilian and first Islamist president, elected June 30 as the Muslim Brotherhood's Freedom and Justice Party candidate after Mubarak's 2011 fall; his November 2012 power-consolidating constitutional declaration triggered mass protests, and he was ousted by the military in July 2013, dying in a Cairo courtroom in 2019. |
| [Kim Jong-un's 2012 Leadership Consolidation in North Korea](kim-jong-un-2012-succession.md) | The new Supreme Leader's first year after Kim Jong-il's December 2011 death — the April 15 centennial parade and his debut public speech, the April 13 satellite-launch failure and December 12 success, and the July purge of Chief of the General Staff Ri Yong-ho. |
| [Xi Jinping's 2012 Elevation to General Secretary](xi-jinping-2012-elevation.md) | Xi's November 15 election as CCP General Secretary and Central Military Commission chairman at the 18th Party Congress — the once-a-decade handover from Hu Jintao, shadowed by the Bo Xilai scandal — inaugurating the fifth-generation leadership and a decade of anti-corruption drives, military modernization, and the Belt and Road Initiative. |
<!-- END GENERATED: category-index -->
